message:
Add missing required env vars to nightly smoke workflow

The check_env.py script requires BLOCKLIST_PATH, SCROLL_SHRINK_WARNING_THRESHOLD,
OVERLAP_WARNING_RATIO, and WARNING_LOG_PATH but these were not set in the
workflow's .env file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -83,6 +83,10 @@ jobs:
           RUNS_DB_PATH=runs.db
           PROMETHEUS_PORT=9000
           HTMX_SSE_HEARTBEAT_MS=4000
+          BLOCKLIST_PATH=config/blocklist.json
+          SCROLL_SHRINK_WARNING_THRESHOLD=1
+          OVERLAP_WARNING_RATIO=0.65
+          WARNING_LOG_PATH=ops/warnings.jsonl
           EOF
 
       - name: Install Playwright browsers
